Off Calendar Nov-19-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Roberto Ripamonti of Lohr Ripamonti LLP telephone number 415-729-4718 for Plaintiff.
Catherine Dacre of Seyfarth Shaw LLP telephone number 415-397-2823 for Defendant.

Ruling: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF AMY NG's Motion For Final Approval of Class Settlement is granted. Order and judgment signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion For Final Class Settlement Approval
Off Calendar Nov-02-2015 Continued To Nov-19-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows:
PLAINTIFF AMY NG'S Notice Of Motion For Final Class Settlement Approval is continued to November 19, 2015 per the agreement of the parties and to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than November 2, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f).Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ehg
